title: Finally Execution
description: Ensure a 'Cleanup' message is printed regardless of an error.
problemStatement:
The `finally` block always runs. Write a `try-catch-finally` block. Inside `try`, throw a generic `Exception`. In `finally`, print `"Cleanup Complete"`.

**Expected Output:** `Cleanup Complete`.
hints: Even if the code returns or an exception is thrown, `finally` will execute.
